body.label: Input Output Engineering Core Development Proposal (2of6)
description: Milestone Cancellation: We recommend the cancellation of a works
tream and its associated milestones. The rationale is detailed b
elow, and outcome of this cancellation is to release funding fro
m relevant Smart Contract and back to the Treasury.
reason: IO is requesting the cancellation of milestones MS5.10 through
MS5.14 of the Acropolis project. IO has successfully delivered
all milestones through March 2026 (MS5.1 through MS5.9),
producing a functional Rust-based data node with full transactio
n validation,Blockfrost-compatible APIs, and production adoption
by ecosystem partners. Following a strategic assessment aligned
with Cardano's priorities of increasing TVL, monthly active use
rs, and transaction volume, IO has determined that further devel
opment on Acropolis would not be enhancing these priorities, whi
lst node diversity is continuing to progress with projects like
Amaru, Dingo, and others. Acropolis remains fully OpenSource.

vendor.label: Input Output Engineering Core Development Proposal (3of6)
